title: Custom Neoprene Rainbow Stripe Makeup Bag Travel Cosmetic Pouch with Zipper
seoTitle: Custom Neoprene Rainbow Stripe Makeup Bag | Waterproof Travel Cosmetic Pouch Manufacturer
description:
Bring color and practicality together with this Custom Neoprene Rainbow Stripe Makeup Bag, designed for modern travelers and beauty enthusiasts. Featuring an eye-catching rainbow stripe design on a vibrant pink background, this cosmetic pouch combines stylish aesthetics with everyday functionality.

Made from premium neoprene, the bag is lightweight, soft, and resistant to splashes, making it ideal for protecting cosmetics, skincare products, and travel essentials. Its spacious main compartment easily accommodates foundation, sunscreen, lipsticks, makeup brushes, facial creams, and other daily necessities while maintaining a compact silhouette that fits effortlessly into handbags, suitcases, backpacks, or beach totes.

The durable zipper glides smoothly for quick access, while the reinforced stitching improves long-term durability for repeated daily use. The colorful design also creates excellent branding opportunities, making it an attractive promotional product for cosmetics brands, beauty subscription boxes, hotels, resorts, spas, retail stores, and corporate gifts.

As an experienced OEM & ODM manufacturer, Guizhou O'lay Technology Co., Ltd offers extensive customization services, including logo printing, exclusive patterns, color matching, packaging design, and size modifications to meet your private label requirements.
seoDescription: Discover our custom neoprene rainbow stripe makeup bag featuring a lightweight design, water-resistant material, durable zipper, and OEM logo customization. Ideal for travel, beauty brands, promotional gifts, wholesale, and private label cosmetic packaging.
